title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 26 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 26 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 26 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/01/2026
Today, Dalian iron ore futures trended weakly. The benchmark contract I2605 ultimately closed at 784.5 RMB/tonne,representing a decline of 0.95% from the previous trading day. In the physical market, prices dropped by approximately 2-7 RMB/tonne.
